prompt: Create a 10-second Manim scene that explains attention weights with a 4 by 4 heatmap. Add query and key labels, highlight one query row, and show that one token focuses strongly on two inputs.
completion:
from manim import *

class AttentionHeatmapFocus(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Attention Heatmap", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        values = [
            [0.20, 0.55, 0.15, 0.10],
            [0.10, 0.20, 0.55, 0.15],
            [0.08, 0.12, 0.30, 0.50],
            [0.45, 0.22, 0.18, 0.15],
        ]
        cells = VGroup()
        for row in values:
            row_group = VGroup()
            for value in row:
                square = Square(side_length=0.78, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_C, fill_opacity=0.15 + 0.7 * value)
                text = DecimalNumber(value, num_decimal_places=2, font_size=20).move_to(square)
                row_group.add(VGroup(square, text))
            row_group.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.05)
            cells.add(row_group)
        cells.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.05).shift(LEFT * 0.4)
        query_labels = VGroup(*[Text(f"q{i + 1}", font_size=22).next_to(cells[i], LEFT, buff=0.25) for i in range(4)])
        key_labels = VGroup(*[Text(f"k{i + 1}", font_size=22).next_to(cells[0][i], UP, buff=0.2) for i in range(4)])
        row_box = SurroundingRectangle(cells[2], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.08)
        focus_box = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(cells[2][2], cells[2][3]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.08)
        caption = Text("One query can place most of its weight on a few relevant keys.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(cells), FadeIn(query_labels), FadeIn(key_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(row_box), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(focus_box), Indicate(cells[2][2][0], color=GREEN_A), Indicate(cells[2][3][0], color=GREEN_A), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=1)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 20-second Manim scene that explains a transformer encoder stack. Show token embeddings flowing upward through repeated encoder blocks with self-attention and feed-forward labels, plus residual arrows on the side.
completion:
from manim import *

class TransformerEncoderStack(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Transformer Encoder Stack", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        token_row = VGroup(*[
            RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.08, width=1.0, height=0.5, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_C, fill_opacity=0.18)
            for _ in range(4)
        ]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.18).shift(DOWN * 2.8)
        token_labels = VGroup(*[Text(label, font_size=22).move_to(box) for label, box in zip(["The", "model", "reads", "tokens"], token_row)])
        blocks = VGroup()
        block_labels = VGroup()
        for i in range(3):
            block = RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.14, width=4.8, height=1.25, color=TEAL_D, fill_color=TEAL_E, fill_opacity=0.18).shift(UP * (i * 1.65 - 0.2))
            labels = VGroup(
                Text("Self-Attention", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).move_to(block.get_center() + UP * 0.22),
                Text("Feed-Forward", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).move_to(block.get_center() + DOWN * 0.22),
            )
            blocks.add(block)
            block_labels.add(labels)
        input_arrow = Arrow(token_row.get_top(), blocks[0].get_bottom(), buff=0.12, color=GRAY_B)
        between = VGroup(*[
            Arrow(blocks[i].get_top(), blocks[i + 1].get_bottom(), buff=0.12, color=GRAY_B)
            for i in range(2)
        ])
        residuals = VGroup(*[
            CurvedArrow(block.get_left() + LEFT * 0.15 + DOWN * 0.3, block.get_left() + LEFT * 0.15 + UP * 0.3, angle=PI / 2, color=YELLOW_D)
            for block in blocks
        ])
        output_label = Text("Context-rich token states", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).next_to(blocks[-1], UP, buff=0.3)
        caption = Text("Repeated blocks refine the token representation step by step.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(token_row), FadeIn(token_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(GrowArrow(input_arrow), FadeIn(blocks[0]), FadeIn(block_labels[0]), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in between], lag_ratio=0.35), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(block) for block in blocks[1:]], lag_ratio=0.35), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(labels) for labels in block_labels[1:]], lag_ratio=0.35), run_time=5)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(arrow) for arrow in residuals], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(output_label), FadeIn(caption), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 10-second Manim scene that shows a training loss curve dropping over epochs and flattening near convergence. Include axes, several highlighted checkpoints, and a short caption about diminishing returns.
completion:
from manim import *

class TrainingLossCurve(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Training Loss", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 8, 1], y_range=[0, 4.5, 1], x_length=7, y_length=4, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("epoch", font_size=22), Text("loss", font_size=22))
        points = [(0, 4.0), (1, 2.8), (2, 1.9), (3, 1.3), (4, 0.95), (5, 0.72), (6, 0.58), (7, 0.50)]
        graph = VMobject(color=BLUE_D, stroke_width=4)
        graph.set_points_smoothly([axes.c2p(x, y) for x, y in points])
        dots = VGroup(*[Dot(axes.c2p(x, y), color=YELLOW_D, radius=0.06) for x, y in points[1::2]])
        plateau = SurroundingRectangle(VGroup(dots[-2], dots[-1]), color=GREEN_D, buff=0.16)
        caption = Text("Early updates help most. Later steps still matter, but less.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(axis_labels), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(graph), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in dots], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=2)
        self.play(Create(plateau), FadeIn(caption), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 20-second Manim scene that visualizes embeddings as three clusters on a plane. Label the clusters, show a central prototype for each, and add a caption that similar items stay close together.
completion:
from manim import *

class EmbeddingClusterMap(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Embedding Space", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], x_length=8, y_length=4.8, background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.2}).shift(DOWN * 0.1)
        centers = [LEFT * 2.8 + UP * 0.8, RIGHT * 0.1 + DOWN * 0.2, RIGHT * 3.0 + UP * 1.0]
        colors = [BLUE_D, GREEN_D, ORANGE]
        names = ["animals", "tools", "cities"]
        clusters = VGroup()
        labels = VGroup()
        prototypes = VGroup()
        offsets = [
            [LEFT * 0.4, RIGHT * 0.35 + UP * 0.22, DOWN * 0.35, LEFT * 0.15 + DOWN * 0.22],
            [LEFT * 0.28 + UP * 0.2, RIGHT * 0.33, DOWN * 0.32, RIGHT * 0.18 + UP * 0.35],
            [LEFT * 0.3, RIGHT * 0.36 + DOWN * 0.16, UP * 0.35, LEFT * 0.18 + DOWN * 0.32],
        ]
        for center, color, name, local_offsets in zip(centers, colors, names, offsets):
            dots = VGroup(*[Dot(center + offset, color=color, radius=0.07) for offset in local_offsets])
            proto = Star(color=YELLOW_D, fill_color=YELLOW_E, fill_opacity=0.8, outer_radius=0.12).move_to(center)
            label = Text(name, font_size=24, color=color).next_to(dots, UP)
            clusters.add(dots)
            prototypes.add(proto)
            labels.add(label)
        caption = Text("Nearby points tend to encode similar meaning or behavior.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), run_time=3)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(group) for group in clusters], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(proto) for proto in prototypes], lag_ratio=0.25), FadeIn(labels), run_time=4)
        self.play(*[Indicate(group, color=color) for group, color in zip(clusters, colors)], run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 20-second Manim scene that explains a reaction coordinate diagram. Show reactants, a transition-state peak, products, and dashed guides indicating the activation barrier.
completion:
from manim import *

class ReactionCoordinateCurve(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Reaction Coordinate", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 10, 1], y_range=[0, 6, 1], x_length=7.5, y_length=4.5, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("reaction progress", font_size=22), Text("energy", font_size=22))
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 0.012 * (x - 5) ** 4 - 0.42 * (x - 5) ** 2 + 4.4, x_range=[0.5, 9.2], color=BLUE_D)
        reactants = Dot(axes.c2p(1.0, 2.0), color=GREEN_D, radius=0.08)
        products = Dot(axes.c2p(9.0, 1.2), color=TEAL_D, radius=0.08)
        peak = Dot(axes.c2p(5.0, 4.4), color=RED_D, radius=0.08)
        labels = VGroup(
            Text("Reactants", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).next_to(reactants, LEFT),
            Text("Products", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).next_to(products, RIGHT),
            Text("Transition state", font_size=22, color=RED_D).next_to(peak, UP),
        )
        barrier = DashedLine(axes.c2p(1.0, 2.0), axes.c2p(1.0, 4.4), color=YELLOW_D)
        barrier_label = Text("activation barrier", font_size=22, color=YELLOW_D).next_to(barrier, LEFT)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(axis_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(curve), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(reactants), FadeIn(products), FadeIn(peak), FadeIn(labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(barrier), FadeIn(barrier_label), run_time=3)
        self.play(Indicate(peak, color=RED_A), Indicate(barrier, color=YELLOW_A), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 10-second Manim scene that shows the bent geometry of water. Draw the oxygen and two hydrogens, include the bond angle arc, and add a caption that lone pairs compress the angle.
completion:
from manim import *

class WaterBentGeometry(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Water Geometry", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        oxygen = Circle(radius=0.45, color=RED_D, fill_color=RED_E, fill_opacity=0.35)
        oxygen_label = Text("O", font_size=28).move_to(oxygen)
        h1 = Circle(radius=0.28, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_E, fill_opacity=0.25).shift(LEFT * 2.0 + DOWN * 1.0)
        h2 = h1.copy().shift(RIGHT * 4.0)
        h1_label = Text("H", font_size=22).move_to(h1)
        h2_label = Text("H", font_size=22).move_to(h2)
        bond1 = Line(oxygen.get_center() + LEFT * 0.22 + DOWN * 0.12, h1.get_center() + RIGHT * 0.22 + UP * 0.1, color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=4)
        bond2 = Line(oxygen.get_center() + RIGHT * 0.22 + DOWN * 0.12, h2.get_center() + LEFT * 0.22 + UP * 0.1, color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=4)
        angle = Arc(radius=0.9, start_angle=230 * DEGREES, angle=80 * DEGREES, color=YELLOW_D)
        angle_label = MathTex("104.5^\\circ", color=YELLOW_D).next_to(angle, DOWN, buff=0.12)
        caption = Text("Lone pairs push the bonds closer together, making the shape bent.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(oxygen), FadeIn(oxygen_label), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(h1), FadeIn(h2), FadeIn(h1_label), FadeIn(h2_label), Create(bond1), Create(bond2), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(angle), FadeIn(angle_label), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1)

prompt: Create a 20-second Manim scene that explains the shape of a titration curve. Show a slow rise, a sharp equivalence region, and a final basic plateau with a vertical guide at equivalence.
completion:
from manim import *

class TitrationCurveShape(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Titration Curve", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 10, 1], y_range=[0, 14, 2], x_length=7.2, y_length=4.6, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("base added", font_size=22), Text("pH", font_size=22))
        curve = axes.plot(lambda x: 7 + 0.17 * (x - 5) ** 3, x_range=[1.0, 9.0], color=BLUE_D)
        eq_line = DashedLine(axes.c2p(5, 0), axes.c2p(5, 14), color=YELLOW_D)
        eq_label = Text("equivalence point", font_size=22, color=YELLOW_D).next_to(eq_line, UP)
        acidic = Text("acidic", font_size=22, color=GREEN_D).move_to(axes.c2p(2.0, 3.0))
        basic = Text("basic", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).move_to(axes.c2p(8.0, 11.0))
        caption = Text("Most of the pH change is concentrated near equivalence.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(axis_labels), run_time=3)
        self.play(Create(curve), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(eq_line), FadeIn(eq_label), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(acidic), FadeIn(basic), run_time=3)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), Indicate(eq_line, color=YELLOW_A), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 10-second Manim scene that introduces sp2 hybridization with a trigonal planar arrangement. Show a central carbon, three in-plane bonds at 120 degrees, and a caption about planar geometry.
completion:
from manim import *

class SP2TrigonalPlane(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("sp2 Hybridization", font_size=36).to_edge(UP)
        center = Circle(radius=0.34, color=GRAY_D, fill_color=GRAY_C, fill_opacity=0.28)
        center_label = Text("C", font_size=24).move_to(center)
        angles = [90 * DEGREES, 210 * DEGREES, 330 * DEGREES]
        terminals = VGroup()
        bonds = VGroup()
        for angle in angles:
            end = 2.2 * np.array([np.cos(angle), np.sin(angle), 0])
            terminal = Circle(radius=0.22, color=BLUE_D, fill_color=BLUE_E, fill_opacity=0.24).move_to(end)
            bond = Line(center.get_center(), terminal.get_center(), color=TEAL_D, stroke_width=4)
            terminals.add(terminal)
            bonds.add(bond)
        plane = DashedVMobject(RegularPolygon(n=3, radius=2.2, color=YELLOW_D).rotate(PI / 2), num_dashes=24)
        caption = Text("Three sp2 hybrids sit in one plane with roughly 120 degree spacing.", font_size=24, color=GRAY_C).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(center), FadeIn(center_label), run_time=2)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(bond) for bond in bonds], lag_ratio=0.2), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(atom) for atom in terminals], lag_ratio=0.2), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(plane), run_time=2)
        self.play(FadeIn(caption), run_time=1)
        self.wait(1)
